rationale: No direct conflict. §22.107 mandates minimum wage payments for support staff; increasing the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter that obligation. Any revenue impact is mediated through school finance formulas, not this statute.
quote: A school district shall pay each full-time district employee, other than an administrator or an employee subject to the minimum salary schedule under Section 21.402, an amount at least equal to $500.
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on school district budgets is possible but not a textual conflict; Texas school finance formulas typically offset homestead exemption revenue losses via state aid.
